response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq and Optilyz, plus recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure exposure that maps to the job's AI agent development requirement. Background spans the required databases (MongoDB), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and multiple languages (TS, Java, C++, DLang), with a strong testing/TDD culture evidenced by workshops and the Fluent-Asserts library. Gaps exist around Nest.js, React depth, and Kotlin specifically, but the breadth and craftsmanship signals strongly support an interview.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with deep TypeScript/Node.js production experience at scale
Direct AI-agent and MCP code-generator work at current role aligns with required AI agent skills
Strong testing/TDD pedigree — built test frameworks, ran TDD workshops, applied trunk-based CI/CD
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
React experience present but secondary to backend/DLang focus across roles

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stack
Strong craftsmanship, testing, and architecture track record
